title: The Execution of Wazir al-Sakhtiyani
description: According to Abu 'Ubaydah: Then Wazir al-Sakhtiyani rebelled against Khalid with a small number of men. His rebellion took place at al-Hirah. He would not pass by a village but that he would burn it, nor by a person but that he would kill him. He got control over what was there and over the treasury. Khalid sent against him a commander from among his companions and a detachment from the security forces of al-Kufah. They fought him, while he had with him a very small number of men.

sources.citation: al-Tabari, The History of al-Tabari (SUNY), vol. 25
